test.create_query: CREATE TABLE minmax_bench_partitioned ( t DateTime, c UInt32, INDEX idx_t t TYPE minmax GRANULARITY 1, INDEX idx_c c TYPE minmax GRANULARITY 1 ) ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(t) ORDER BY t
CREATE TABLE minmax_bench_wide ( t DateTime, c UInt32, v UInt64, INDEX idx_c c TYPE minmax GRANULARITY 1, INDEX idx_v v TYPE minmax GRANULARITY 1 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY t
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO minmax_bench_partitioned SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') + number, intHash32(number) FROM numbers(30000000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 8
INSERT INTO minmax_bench_wide SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') + number, intHash32(number), intHash64(number + 1) FROM numbers(20000000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 8
test.query: SELECT count() FROM minmax_bench_wide WHERE c >= 0 SETTINGS use_minmax_index_bulk_filtering = {bulk}
